code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (FinTech_LedgerService)
        - Area (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给FinTech的交易问题流转画个状态图。起点应该是TransactionQueue，问题创建后进入Opened状态。
明白了，Opened之后直接到开发吗？还是有个分拣环节？
有个Triage环节，平台负责人会评审有效性、优先级和指派。Triage之后可能Accepted进Todo，也可能Rejected直接Closed，或者需要更多信息走NeedsInfo。
所以NeedsInfo可以回到Triage，也可以因无响应关闭？然后Todo到InProgress是工作开始，InProgress还能回Todo表示暂停？
对，InProgress还有Blocked分支，依赖解决后Unblocked回来，或者换Alternative方案回Todo。开发完PR opened走InReview。
画好了主干。InReview到Done是PR merged，Done之后连到FraudDetection？Closed连到PaymentGateway？
方向反了，Done应该指向FraudDetection，Closed指向PaymentGateway，表示不同终态的归属系统。另外每个状态加个注释说明关键活动，比如Opened要标记LedgerService类型和TransactionQueue区域。
已修正流向，补全了Triage的评审问题、Todo的P3优先级和XS-XL工作量、InProgress的分支提交、InReview的CODEOWNERS审批，以及Done的部署自动关闭这些注释。
